meta.summary: tRNAscan-SE detects and functionally classifies transfer RNA genes in genomic or transcript FASTA sequences.
meta.description: tRNAscan-SE detects and functionally classifies transfer RNA genes in genomic or transcript FASTA sequences.

test: cmsearch -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'INFERNAL 1.1.5' >/dev/null && cmscan -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'INFERNAL 1.1.5' >/dev/null && cmalign -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'INFERNAL 1.1.5' >/dev/null
EukHighConfidenceFilter -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: EukHighConfidenceFilter' >/dev/null && MitoHighConfidenceFilter -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: MitoHighConfidenceFilter' >/dev/null

command -v fasta2gsi >/dev/null && command -v sstofa >/dev/null && command -v eufindtRNA >/dev/null && command -v trnascan-1.4 >/dev/null && command -v covels-SE >/dev/null && command -v coves-SE >/dev/null

rm -rf /tmp/taf-trnascan-se-smoke && mkdir -p /tmp/taf-trnascan-se-smoke && cd /tmp/taf-trnascan-se-smoke && cp /opt/trnascan-se/share/doc/tRNAscan-SE/Demo/Example1.fa . && tRNAscan-SE -q -Q --thread 1 --detail -H -o result.out -f result.ss -s result.iso -m result.stats -b result.bed -j result.gff -a result.fa Example1.fa >/tmp/taf-trnascan-se-smoke.log 2>&1 && test -s result.out && test -s result.ss && test -s result.iso && test -s result.stats && test -s result.bed && test -s result.gff && test -s result.fa && grep -F 'Sequence' result.out >/dev/null && grep -F 'Inf' result.out >/dev/null && grep -F 'Seq:' result.ss >/dev/null && grep -F 'Str:' result.ss >/dev/null && grep -F 'ID=CELF22B7.trna' result.gff >/dev/null && rm -rf /tmp/taf-trnascan-se-smoke /tmp/taf-trnascan-se-smoke.log

rm -rf /tmp/taf-trnascan-se-filter && mkdir -p /tmp/taf-trnascan-se-filter && cd /tmp/taf-trnascan-se-filter && cp /opt/trnascan-se/share/doc/tRNAscan-SE/Demo/Example1.fa . && tRNAscan-SE -q -Q --thread 1 --detail -H -o result.out -f result.ss Example1.fa >/tmp/taf-trnascan-se-filter-scan.log 2>&1 && EukHighConfidenceFilter -i result.out -s result.ss -o euk-filter -p euk >/tmp/taf-trnascan-se-filter.log 2>&1 && test -s euk-filter/euk.out && test -s euk-filter/euk.ss && test -s euk-filter/euk.log && rm -rf /tmp/taf-trnascan-se-filter /tmp/taf-trnascan-se-filter-scan.log /tmp/taf-trnascan-se-filter.log

rm -rf /tmp/taf-trnascan-se-legacy && mkdir -p /tmp/taf-trnascan-se-legacy && cd /tmp/taf-trnascan-se-legacy && cp /opt/trnascan-se/share/doc/tRNAscan-SE/Demo/Example1.fa . && tRNAscan-SE -q -Q -L -o legacy.out Example1.fa >/tmp/taf-trnascan-se-legacy.log 2>&1 && test -s legacy.out && grep -F 'Sequence' legacy.out >/dev/null && rm -rf /tmp/taf-trnascan-se-legacy /tmp/taf-trnascan-se-legacy.log

upstream.name: tRNAscan-SE
upstream.citation: Chan et al. 2021, tRNAscan-SE 2.0: improved detection and functional classification of transfer RNA genes
